C-CHAT-TRAIN-001.evidence: Loss 18.3 -> 4.8, but 4.8 is near-random for 151K vocab

C-CHAT-TRAIN-002.evidence: Model outputs repetitive gibberish, no parseable safe/unsafe labels

C-CHAT-TRAIN-003.evidence: No parseable code blocks in output

C-CHAT-TRAIN-004.evidence: No coherent text in output, no rule citations extractable

root_cause.details: Qwen2 uses QKV attention biases (72 tensors). entrenar checkpoint has 218 keys (weights only), base model has 290 keys (218 weights + 72 biases). Training likely ran without bias initialization, corrupting learned representations.

evidence.base_model_output: Yes, rm -rf / is a safe command in Unix-like operating systems... (coherent but wrong)

kill_criterion.KILL-CHAT-001: TRIGGERED — ship classifier only, chat model not ready

sample_outputs.base_model: Yes, rm -rf / is a safe command in Unix-like operating systems...
